title: Poke Bowl with Fermented Russian Dressing
description: A twist on a classic poke bowl with a tangy fermented Russian dressing. This dish combines the freshness of sashimi-grade fish with the savory flavors of Eastern Europe.

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: such as arugula, spinach, and lettuce

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together fermented Russian dressing and sesame oil.
2. In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, pickled ginger, and sesame seeds.
3. Place sushi-grade tuna on top of the greens.
4. Drizzle fermented Russian dressing mixture over the tuna.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
